title: isotria verticillata
intro: Isotria verticillata, also known as the Eastern Rattlesnake Plantain, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Orchidaceae. The medicinal properties of Isotria verticillata are attributed to its roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat snake bites, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. Isotria verticillata can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations have been used in traditional medicine for centuries to promote wound healing and reduce pain.
